summary_lines: quarantine status: move scratch duplicates out of tracked workspace before treating the worktree as operator-clean

groups.label: Workflow drafts
groups.quarantine_rule: Move draft workflow copies to /tmp or a gitignored scratch path before the next PR.

groups.label: Backend workspace scratch
groups.quarantine_rule: Keep only the canonical backend source file in-repo; move experiments to /tmp or gitignored local scratch.

groups.label: Docs distribution evidence
groups.quarantine_rule: Keep one dated evidence file only; remove suffixed copies after choosing the canonical evidence artifact.

groups.label: Docs/spec variants
groups.quarantine_rule: Promote one spec file to canonical or move the variant out of docs/specs before review.

groups.label: Mobile asset drafts
groups.quarantine_rule: Keep active asset exploration outside the tracked asset tree or replace the canonical asset in a single step.

groups.label: Mobile workspace scratch
groups.quarantine_rule: Move temporary mobile copies to a gitignored scratch location; leave only the canonical workspace file in-repo.

groups.label: Web workspace scratch
groups.quarantine_rule: Move temporary web copies to a gitignored scratch location; do not keep suffixed copies under web/.

duplicates.quarantine_rule: Move temporary web copies to a gitignored scratch location; do not keep suffixed copies under web/.

groups.label: Repo root misc scratch
groups.quarantine_rule: Move root-level scratch copies out of the repo root once the canonical file is identified.

duplicate_inventory.quarantine_rule: Move temporary web copies to a gitignored scratch location; do not keep suffixed copies under web/.
